description: Eval cases for performance issues: N+1 queries, algorithmic complexity, memory leaks

cases.name: N+1 query problem
Inefficient nested loop
Memory leak via unclosed resource
cases.code_snippet:
def process_file(filename):
    f = open(filename)
    data = f.read()
    return process(data)  # File never closed

cases.name: Unbounded cache growth
cases.description: Cache without size limit or TTL

cases.name: String concatenation in loop
cases.code_snippet:
result = ''
for item in items:
    result += str(item) + ','
return result

cases.name: Optimized query with prefetch
cases.description: Properly prefetched query should not be flagged
